title: The Belly Fat Fact Every Woman Over 40 Needs to Know
description: Belly fat after 40 is visceral fat — it wraps around organs, responds to cortisol, and is released only when hormones are balanced. This is why the scale goes down but the belly stays. title: 5x higher health risk from visceral belly fat vs. subcutaneous fat
description: Visceral belly fat (the kind around your organs) carries 5x the health risk of regular fat. It's the fat that refuses to leave after 40.
